rule_name: MSSP - SW - CM - 01 - M - Allowed Inbound Flow Observed from Suspicious IPs
group: MSSP - Rules, Switches, SW - CISCO Meraki

text: when an event matches any of the following MSSP - SW - CM - 01(a) - M - Inbound Flow Observed from Anonymization Services, MSSP - SW - CM - 01(b) - M - Inbound Flow Observed from Botnet CnC Server, MSSP - SW - CM - 01(c) - M - Inbound Flow Observed from Bots, MSSP - SW - CM - 01(d) - M - Inbound Flow Observed from Cryptocurrency Mining, MSSP - SW - CM - 01(e) - M - Inbound Flow Observed from Dynamic IPs, MSSP - SW - CM - 01(f) - M - Inbound Flow Observed from Malware, MSSP - SW - CM - 01(g) - M - Inbound Flow Observed from Scanning IPs, MSSP - SW - CM - 01(h) - M - Inbound Flow Observed from Spam
when at least 1 events are seen with the same Source IP in 30 minutes

formatString: MSSP - SW - CM - 01 - M - Allowed Inbound Flow Observed from Suspicious IPs
